articles.title: Solana Dominates Ethereum In Daily Active Wallets, SOL Back To $140?
articles.description: Solana (SOL), the fourth-generation blockchain, has staged a remarkable comeback, looking at on-chain metrics. Citing Artemis data, Step Data Insights on X noted that Solana’s daily active wallets flipped Ethereum’s, the pioneer smart contract platform. This development is when SOL prices have been ripping past resistance levels in the past few months. Solana’s Resurgence Continues, Daily...
